summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was provided or inferred. Hydrated open PRs are kept independently for normal maintainer review; unavailable refs need refreshed hydration before classification. No merge, close, fix, or raise-PR action is planned because the job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr and disables low-signal/instant closeout.
